---
title: "Discussion Stemming"
author: "R.J. Dyer"
date: "12/14/2016"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
```

## The Data

```{r}
raw_files <- list.files(path = "./Evolution", pattern="*.txt",full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
```

Providing $N =$`r length(raw_files)` 


```{r}

```
